title: FEDERAL RESERVE RATE HIKE
desc: Rising interest rates slow economic growth, reducing industrial activity and cutting fuel demand.

title: DRONE STRIKE ON REFINERY
desc: A targeted attack on a major refinery knocks out a significant chunk of regional fuel production.

title: CHINA ECONOMIC SLOWDOWN
desc: Weaker growth in the world's largest oil consumer tanks global crude demand expectations.

title: WINTER COLD SNAP
desc: An unusually brutal winter drives a surge in home heating and energy demand nationwide.

title: NEW OFFSHORE RESERVES FOUND
desc: A major discovery of untapped offshore oil reserves boosts long-term supply outlooks.

title: RUSSIA EXPORT BAN
desc: Russia cuts off crude exports to key allies, tightening global supply and spiking prices.

title: CARBON TAX INTRODUCED
desc: A new federal carbon tax raises costs for refiners, which get passed directly to consumers at the pump.

title: MILD SUMMER FORECAST
desc: Weather agencies predict a cooler-than-average summer, dampening demand for road trips and AC-heavy driving.

title: TANKER ROUTE BLOCKAGE
desc: A grounded vessel blocks a critical shipping strait, delaying millions of barrels of crude in transit.

title: REMOTE WORK TREND GROWS
desc: A surge in work-from-home adoption cuts daily commuter traffic, meaningfully reducing gasoline consumption.

title: OPEC UNITY COLLAPSES
desc: Internal disagreements cause OPEC members to overproduce, flooding the market with cheap crude.

title: REFINERY CYBERATTACK
desc: Hackers shut down automated systems at several major refineries, halting fuel output for days.
